extortion.description: Brachot is a leading specialist in natural stone and blended materials, operating under the name Brachot-Hermant. The company offers a diverse portfolio that includes ceramics, marble composites, and various natural stones for both interior and exterior applications. Established as a wholesaler, Brachot has expanded into an international player with multiple production sites and quarries across several countries.SITE: www.brachot.comADDRESS:E 3 Laan 869800 DeinzeBelgiumTEL#: +32 9 381 81 81ALL DATA SIZE: ≈600gb+1.
